title: parentucellia latifolia subsp. flaviflora
intro: Parentucellia latifolia subsp. flaviflora, also known as yellow toadflax, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory agent, to soothe and calm irritated tissues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Parentucellia latifolia subsp. flaviflora include its ability to ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have also been used in topical applications to promote wound healing and skin health.
